title: clinopodium amissum
intro: Clinopodium amissum, also known as Mexican oregano, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium amissum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce stress and anxiety. Clinopodium amissum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used as a flavoring agent in traditional Mexican cuisine.
